title: erigeron trilobus
intro: Erigeron trilobus, also known as the three-lobed fleabane or California fleabane, is a perennial wildflower native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the respiratory system. The herbal preparations of Erigeron trilobus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
